quickReplies.label: What landscaping services do you offer?

faq.a: We serve McKinney, Frisco, Allen, Plano, and surrounding Collin County areas in Texas.
Yes! We offer free on-site estimates for all services. Call (214) 555-0123 to schedule.

faq.q: How much does lawn maintenance cost?
faq.a: Lawn maintenance starts at $75-150 per visit depending on property size. We offer weekly and bi-weekly plans.
Yes, Green Valley Landscaping is fully licensed, bonded, and insured in the state of Texas.

faq.q: How long does a landscaping project take?
faq.a: Most residential projects are completed in 2-4 weeks depending on scope. We'll give you a timeline during your free estimate.
